accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to manage users in this company.
pageDescription: Administrative area to view and manage users from the active company.
addUserDescription: Enter the email of a user already registered in the system and choose their role in this company.
usersListDescription: Active users linked to the current tenant.
noUsersFound: No users were found for this company.
modalDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the active company?
modalWarning: This action removes the user's link to the company and also the role associated with this tenant.
toastUserAddedMessage: User successfully added to the company.
toastRoleUpdatedMessageExisting: The user already existed in the company and the role was updated.
toastNoChangesMessageRole: The user already belongs to the company with this role.
toastUnexpectedAddErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred while adding the user.
toastNoChangesMessageCurrentRole: The user already has this role.
toastUnexpectedChangeRoleErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred while changing the role.
toastUserRemovedMessage: User successfully removed from the company.
toastUnexpectedRemoveErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred while removing the user.
loadUsersUnexpectedError: Unexpected error while loading company users.
